assignments.name: server_url
assignments.value: YOUR N8N SERVER URL WITHOUT THE / AT THE END

parameters.content:
## 1️⃣ Schedule Trigger (Weekly) 
**⏰ WEEKLY TRIGGER**
Automatically runs every Monday at 6 AM
→ Change schedule in node settings if needed
→ Can be set to daily, monthly, or custom cron

## 2️⃣ Set Config Variables 
**⚙️ CONFIGURATION - EDIT THIS FIRST!**
📧 email_to: your.email@domain.com
📁 project_name: Your-Project-Name
🌐 server_url: https://n8n.yourdomain.com
   ⚠️ NO trailing slash (/)!
🌍 Language: "EN" or "FR"

→ These variables control the entire workflow
→ Must be configured before first run

## 3️⃣ Generate a security audit 
**🔍 SECURITY AUDIT GENERATOR**
Calls N8N API to generate security audit

📊 Analyzes:
- Credentials risks
- Dangerous nodes (Code, SSH, HTTP, etc.)
- Instance security settings

🔑 Required: N8N API credential
→ Create API key in N8N Settings → API
→ Add credential in this node

## 4️⃣ Filter duplicate WorkflowID 
**🔄 DEDUPLICATION**
Extracts unique workflows from audit results

→ Removes duplicate workflow entries
→ Prepares data for execution lookup
→ Automatic - no configuration needed

## 5️⃣ Get last executions
**📊 EXECUTION STATUS FETCHER**
Gets last execution for each workflow

→ Retrieves success/failure status
→ Shows execution start/stop times
→ Enriches report with real data

🔑 Required: Same N8N API credential as node 3

## 6️⃣ If Language

**🌍 LANGUAGE ROUTER**
Routes to FR or EN formatter

If Language = "FR" → French report
Otherwise → English report

→ Based on variable set in node 2
→ Automatic routing - no config needed

## 7️⃣ Format Audit Report

**FRENCH/ENGLISH FORMATTER**
📝 Creates:
- Markdown version
- HTML email version
- Email subject with risk level

📊 Calculates:
- Unique credentials count
- Nodes breakdown by type
- Overall risk level: 🟩 🟧 🟥

→ Automatic - no configuration needed

## 8️⃣ Send Gmail (HTML)


**📧 EMAIL SENDER**
Sends formatted HTML report via Gmail

✉️ Sends to: Address from node 2 (email_to)
📨 Format: Rich HTML with links & colors
🔗 Includes: Direct links to workflows

🔑 Required: Gmail OAuth2 credential
→ Setup OAuth2 in Google Cloud Console
→ Add Gmail credential in this node

⚠️ Can be replaced with SMTP, Outlook, etc.

## 🎯 Quick Setup Checklist
✅ 1. Create N8N API key (Settings → API)
✅ 2. Setup Gmail OAuth2 credential
✅ 3. Edit "Set Config Variables" node:
      - email_to
      - project_name
      - server_url (no trailing /)
      - Language (EN or FR)
✅ 4. Test workflow manually
✅ 5. Activate for weekly execution

## 💡 Configuration Tips
**🔧 CUSTOMIZATION OPTIONS:**

Schedule:
→ Node 1: Change trigger frequency

Risk Thresholds:
→ Nodes 7: Edit JavaScript conditions
   if (totalCredentials > 5) { ... }

Email Recipients:
→ Node 8: Add multiple emails in toList

Email Service:
→ Node 8: Replace with SMTP/Outlook/etc.

## 📊 Report Contents
**📧 YOU WILL RECEIVE:**

📊 Summary Section:
- Total & unique credentials
- Nodes breakdown by type
- Community nodes count
- Overall risk: 🟩 Low / 🟧 Moderate / 🟥 High

🔐 Credentials Risk Report:
- Exposed credentials list
- Associated workflows

🧩 Nodes Risk Report:
- Dangerous nodes detected
- 🔗 Clickable workflow links
- 🟢/🔴 Last execution status
- ⏰ Execution timestamps

🏢 Instance Risk Report:
- Security settings review
- Recommendations

## ⚠️ Important Notes
**🚨 BEFORE FIRST RUN:**

1. Server URL Format:
   ✅ https://n8n.domain.com
   ❌ https://n8n.domain.com/

2. Language Parameter:
   ✅ "EN" or "FR" (uppercase)
   ❌ "en" or "English"

3. API Permissions:
   → N8N API key must have audit access
   → Check in Settings → API → Permissions

4. Gmail Setup:
   → OAuth2 required (not just password)
   → Enable Gmail API in Google Cloud

## 🐛 Troubleshooting

❌ Empty report?
→ Check N8N API key permissions

❌ Workflow links broken?
→ Verify server_url format (no trailing /)

❌ No execution status?
→ Workflows must be executed at least once

❌ Wrong language?
→ Language must be exactly "EN" or "FR"

❌ Email not sent?
→ Check Gmail OAuth2 credential
→ Verify email_to address is valid

## 📈 Expected Results
**✅ WEEKLY EMAIL WITH:**

Subject: 
"🔒 Audit Report [Project] – Risk 🟧 Moderate"

Content:
- Executive summary with metrics
- Color-coded risk levels
- Direct links to affected workflows
- Real-time execution statuses
- Actionable security recommendations

📊 Typical execution: 10-20 seconds
📧 Email arrives within 1 minute
